generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired Air Force colonel with 30 years in civil defense planning, I've seen firsthand how underfunded our local preparedness systems are. The 2023 Chicago blackout showed what happens when we cut corners - 48 hours without power led to 12 deaths and $2.3B in damages. Our tax dollars should be going to hardened infrastructure and community resilience programs, not just flashy military tech. The data is clear: investing 2% more in civil defense could prevent 80% of disaster casualties. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
